holdings.infoBox: REGL is an equity ETF with a total of 66 individual holdings. The top holdings are Reliance stock at 1.85%, Littelfuse at 1.84%, Ryder System at 1.84%, Cabot at 1.80%, and Unum Group at 1.78%.

overview.description: The ProShares S&P MidCap 400 Dividend Aristocrats ETF (REGL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P MidCap 400 Dividend Aristocrats index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of mid-cap companies that have increased their dividends for at least 15-consecutive years. REGL was launched on Feb 5, 2015 and is issued by ProShares.
